scenes.title: The Village That Is Not Dead Yet
scenes.biggestGap: The village and infirmary read clearly, but they need more Lordaeron labor texture and more physical anchoring around the access and diagnosis dialogue.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A still-working Lordaeron village common with a well, common house, bakery smoke, and the granary sitting inside ordinary harvest routine.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Quiet Thalassian tack, wet mud, rough militia leather, fever-sour bedding, cold stone, and flour or grain dust on working clothes.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads the necromantic pattern in living bodies through gut-first contamination, ward pressure, and field-practical Kirin Tor diagnosis.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every exchange should stay tied to the well, the sickroom, ledgers, or the visible strain in bodies doing autumn work while already infected.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The bakery and granary lock together in Jaina's mind as a physical route from sack to stomach.

scenes.title: Complementary Minds
scenes.biggestGap: The synthesis beats need more route-and-supply texture so the grain answer feels lodged in the village's physical systems, not only in abstract deduction.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The action should pivot between the infirmary window, the granary threshold, and the storehouse back half where the sacks are held.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Residual ward-light on Jaina's hands, grain dust on Sylvanas's gloves, sackcloth, lamp oil, and the clay vessel holding concentrated agent.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina thinks in correlation, intake, and mechanism, but she now checks her answer against Sylvanas's supply read instead of treating it as decorative.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Synthesis lines need ledgers, latches, dust, or visible stores nearby so the conversation never floats above the supply chain.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: A living watcher, the spilled concentrated agent, and the closed granary turn diagnosis into a hunt.

scenes.title: The Granary
scenes.biggestGap: The final beats land cleanly, but they need stronger room texture, bodily contact, and road-bound logistics so the chapter exits in the world rather than on abstract conclusion.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The holding closet, the infirmary hall, and the coughing houses outside must stay concrete all the way to the chapter close.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Latch, stone floor, foam at the mouth, still-warm body, scratched notes, and the fading warmth in Jaina's hands.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina's final-third filter should shift from mechanism to cost without losing her procedural habit of leaving a usable method behind.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Interrogation-collapse and departure dialogue must stay tied to the dead boy, the medic's needs, and the grain road southwest.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Written ward instructions and the imagined loading yards of Andorhal should push the chapter physically onto the next road.
